posts.text: New episode: Building a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline with @maya_chen — five stages, five review checks, and why "the pipeline is the product." Listen now: https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen

Key takeaway from Ep 14: "A transcript is a rich input, not the final source of editorial truth." Automate drafts, not approvals. Pipeline checklist: https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release
